policy_name: Frank Schultz Occupational Therapy Consulting - Expense Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.requirement: CEU courses and exams directly related to Occupational Therapy or hand therapy practice must be pre-approved by Missoula Community Wellness Collective (for retainer-funded CEU) or submitted as a business expense. Maximum $500/year from consulting business without person pre-approval.
validation_rules.action: Submit receipt within 30 days of expense. MCWC Chronic Pain Program advisory contract covers reimbursement for CEU directly related to advisory work.
validation_rules.notes: HTCC exam fees are fully reimbursable per advisory contract terms. Bozeman Nov CEU pre-approved.

validation_rules.requirement: Mileage for person site visits (Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group coordination) is reimbursable at IRS standard rate. Overnight travel requires pre-approval.
validation_rules.action: Log mileage in MileIQ or equivalent. Submit monthly with consulting invoice.
validation_rules.notes: Boise Thanksgiving travel is personal - not reimbursable. Bozeman CEU mileage is business.

validation_rules.requirement: Business meals with clients or advisory team members are 50% deductible. Maximum $75/meal without additional documentation.
validation_rules.action: Document attendees and business purpose on receipt. Submit with monthly expense report.
validation_rules.notes: Plonk Wine counter advisory debrief with Sasha Amin - qualifies.

validation_rules.requirement: Books and professional reference materials directly used for consulting work are 100% deductible. Personal reading not qualifying.
validation_rules.action: Note business use purpose at time of purchase. Cross-reference with consulting deliverables.
validation_rules.notes: Splinting texts, Explain Pain Supercharged, GMI Handbook all qualify. Japanese Home Cooking is personal.

validation_rules.requirement: Software used exclusively or primarily for consulting work is deductible at proportional business-use percentage. Notion (100% business), Zoom (80% business), Gaia GPS (30% business).
validation_rules.action: Document business-use percentage annually. Maintain subscription receipts.
validation_rules.notes: Spotify, MFP Premium are personal - not included.

validation_rules.requirement: Annual HPSO professional liability insurance premium is fully deductible as a business expense.
validation_rules.action: Record at annual renewal. Maintain policy documentation.
validation_rules.notes: Required for OTR/L peer consultation work. $220 annual premium.

context: Frank Schultz OTR/L (sole member, Montana LLC). Primary person: Missoula Community Wellness Collective ($1,500/month retainer). Secondary clients: BRC, MTOTA. PSLF employment maintained through BRC - consulting income is supplemental. SE tax estimated annually. Policy reviewed Q1 each year.
